special_mechanics.name: Commander Unit
special_mechanics.description: Powerful irreplaceable unit with unique abilities including destructor weapon, cloaking/invisibility, water traversal

special_mechanics.name: Unit Variety & Terrain Interaction
special_mechanics.description: Game features multiple unit types (infantry bots, vehicles, ships, hovercraft, aircraft, stationary weapons, giant mecha) with varying speeds and collision properties based on terrain

tier_notes: Total Annihilation is a real-time strategy game, not a character action game. Individual unit movement physics (walk/run/jump/gravity) are not documented in available sources. The game features variable unit types with different movement speeds based on tech level and unit class, but specific movement parameters are not quantified in the Wikipedia article. Tier 2 classification appropriate due to lack of detailed physics documentation for RTS gameplay paradigm.
